ORDER EXTENDING TIME
It is hereby ORDERED that the time: (1) to issue an Order regarding both
Appellant’s Notice of Appeal and Application for Review and Application for Stay is
EXTENDED to and including April 17, 2026; and (2) for the parties to file their
opening set of papers on this review is also EXTENDED to a date that will be
provided for in the forthcoming Order. See FTC Rule 1.146(c).
Jay L. Himes
ORDERED:
Jay L. Himes
Administrative Law Judge
Date: March 27, 2026
